entries.title: A Letter from Silas
entries.text: Found in a hidden alcove of the manor crypts. The parchment is yellowed, but the hand is steady. 'Father was chosen. Now I am chosen. They say the forest needs the blood of a Maren to keep the grain gold and the wells sweet. But I look at my son, little Maren, sleeping by the hearth, and I wonder why the price of bread must be his father's soul.'

fragments.text: Silas Maren was the sacrifice thirty years ago. He went willingly to spare his son.
Lord Ashworth's father was the one who 'asked' for Silas. The Ashworths and Marens have been bound in blood for generations.

entries.title: Aldric's Remorse
entries.text: A scrap of paper found under a loose floorboard in the Lord's study. 'I carved a village from a monster's rib. Now the monster wants its rib back. I promised them safety, but I gave them a cage. May my children forgive me for what I have done to Ashvale.'

fragments.text: Aldric Ashworth knew the pact would eventually consume the village.
The Heartwood isn't a protector; it's a landlord collecting rent.
